Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x17E6 "PANIC64-4000-17E6" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $4000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Panic 64 (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $4000 which: 1. Copies 256 bytes of data from $4030 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400. This allows the game to run correctly. 2. Sets up the correct VICII settings.
Note: to dump, first set a breakpoint at $2355. Once hit, then set a breakpoint at $17E6. Doing this skips the lengthy initialisation phase if we were to use the actual entry point at $224C.
